resultList.dtldesc: Step into a refined world of elegance with this luxurious 4 BHK villa located in the prestigious Shravanthi Oakridge community on Kanakapura Road, Bangalore. Designed for those who appreciate space, privacy, and a premium lifestyle, this independent villa offers a seamless blend of modern architecture and serene surroundings. Nestled within a gated development, the home enjoys scenic views of landscaped gardens, a pool, and the main road, creating a balanced environment of tranquillity and connectivity.::::Property Specifications::Spread across a generous carpet area of 2300 sq. ft, this unfurnished villa provides ample scope for customisation to suit your personal taste and lifestyle. The home comprises four spacious bedrooms, thoughtfully designed to maximise comfort and functionality. In addition to the primary living spaces, the villa includes a dedicated puja room, study, and a store room, catering to both practical and cultural needs. The villa is north-facing, ensuring favourable natural light and ventilation throughout the day. Built within the last 5 to 10 years, the structure reflects modern construction standards and durability. As a freehold property, it offers complete ownership rights, making it a secure long-term investment.::::Facilities::Located within a gated community, the villa grants access to an array of lifestyle amenities, with over 25 facilities designed to enhance everyday living. Residents benefit from 24-hour water availability and reliable electricity with minimal interruptions. The project is approved by the Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards. The peaceful surroundings, combined with views of landscaped areas and recreational spaces, provide a premium residential experience ideal for families seeking comfort and exclusivity.::::Locality::Strategically positioned on Kanakapura Main Road, the villa enjoys excellent connectivity to key parts of Bangalore. The area is rapidly developing, with easy access to reputed schools, healthcare facilities, shopping centres, and daily conveniences. Its location within a well-planned residential corridor makes it a desirable choice for homeowners looking for both accessibility and a serene living environment. The neighbourhood offers a harmonious blend of urban infrastructure and green surroundings, enhancing both lifestyle quality and long-term property value.
